lid_open.text: Ah, you're here. I was beginning to think you'd resigned. Again.
Opening #{count}. Per my last observation, that's excessive.
Let's circle back on why you've opened this {count} times with zero deliverables.
I'm going to need you to come in on Saturday. You clearly aren't getting enough done Monday through Friday.
Just to be transparent, I'm tracking your lid opens. It's in your performance review.
Going forward, I need you to be more intentional about your lid-opening strategy.
As per our last all-hands, lid open #{count} is not aligned with Q2 goals.
I don't want to micromanage, but I will. That's lid open #{count}.

lid_reopen.text: Closed and reopened in {seconds_since_close}s. Please add that to the standup notes.
That's the kind of indecisiveness that costs this company millions.
I'm putting a meeting on your calendar to discuss your close-reopen cadence.
{seconds_since_close} seconds. I've seen faster turnarounds from the printer.

late_night.text: Working at {time}? That's the dedication I like to see but never reward.
It's {time}. I appreciate the hustle. Your bonus won't reflect it, but I appreciate it.
Great to see you online at {time}. I've CC'd everyone on your midnight availability.
I'm scheduling a 6 AM standup since you're clearly a night owl.
{time}. The grind never stops. Neither does your performance improvement plan.

early_morning.text: In early at {time}? Let's use this energy for the TPS reports.
Early bird gets the worm. You'll get another action item.

aggressive_typing.text: {wpm} WPM. Channel that energy into something billable.
I can hear you typing from my corner office. Please keep it down.
Per the employee handbook, aggressive typing falls under 'workplace disruption.'
I'm going to need a written explanation for that typing intensity. By EOD.
That's a lot of passion for someone who hasn't updated their OKRs.

type_delete.text: Rewriting again? Just send it. Nobody reads your emails anyway.
I'm going to need you to finalize that draft. We don't have budget for rewrites.
{ratio}% delete rate. That's not perfectionism, that's a productivity leak.
Done is better than perfect. Ship it. I don't care if it's wrong.

thermal.text: Your laptop is overheating. That's coming out of the IT budget you already exceeded.
If your laptop dies, don't expect a replacement before Q3.
Close some tabs. This isn't a server farm. You don't have server farm clearance.
Thermal state: {thermal}. I'm adding 'asset management' to your development plan.

idle.text: {idle_minutes} minutes idle. I'm going to need a status report on what you accomplished.
AFK for {idle_minutes} minutes? I've flagged this in the time-tracking system.
I noticed you stepped away. The work didn't.
While you were gone for {idle_minutes} minutes, I reassigned two of your tasks.
Break time is 15 minutes, not {idle_minutes}. Check the handbook.
